title: Quality of Life Features for Vic's Point Blank
description: A content pack for Vic's Point Blank that adds small Quality of Life features meant for progression in Survival/Adventure mode
body:
This is a small content pack for Vic's Point Blank that adds Quality of Life features designed for survival/adventure worlds.

_Current features:_
- When obtaining any materials used in crafting for any of the mod's items, you will gain the recipe for that item without having to craft it. (Much like a lot of vanilla Minecraft's craftable items)
- Achievements to indicate progress.
- (FORGE ONLY) Fixes the Arms Dealer Barn not having any loot in its chest & changes the loot table to reflect the nature of the structure (instead of having farming related items, the chest now has ammo, certain firearms, and crafting ingredients)

_Current available achievements:_
- _Print Blank:_ Craft a printer
- _Spinny Spinny!:_ Trade with an Arms Dealer for a Minigun Motor
- _I Am Heavy Weapons Guy:_ Craft a Minigun

_HOW TO INSTALL:_  
**1:** Download the content pack  
**2:** If you haven't already, create a folder in your ".minecraft" folder called "pointblank" (The .minecraft folder is located in a different spot depending on your Operating System and/or Minecraft launcher. The following directories are the default locations for the .minecraft folder depending on your OS:  
* **Windows:** C:\users\\<YOURUSERNAME>\AppData\Roaming\\.minecraft  
* **Linux:** ~/.minecraft  
* **MacOS:** ~/Library/Application Support/minecraft  

**3:** Drag & drop the content pack into the "pointblank" folder inside your ".minecraft" folder
